Landing.hero: Your personal agent for managing your restaurant
Landing.promise1Desc: Not an hour on Excel or clunky management software
Landing.promise2Desc: You don't need to learn a new piece of software
Landing.promise3Desc: Delivers performance results immediately and identifies critical patterns
Landing.promisesFooter: + Integrated training plan to improve every day

Auth.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Auth.errorPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Auth.errorTerms: You must accept the Terms of Service to continue.

ForgotPassword.title: Reset password
ForgotPassword.desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.sentDesc: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.

Reset.title: New password
Reset.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Reset.successDesc: Your password has been saved successfully.
Reset.invalidLink: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new reset link.

Onboarding.welcomeDesc: Professional metrics · plain language · zero business jargon
Onboarding.step3Bot: Rocky has 5 sections. You'll know them all in 30 seconds
Onboarding.step5Bot: Tell me your monthly fixed costs — estimates are fine. We can adjust anything later.
Onboarding.step6Bot: Add your staff. From hourly rate and contract I calculate the real cost — including social contributions, severance, 13th and 14th month.
Onboarding.tourTabTodayDesc: Log a shift in a few lines. Rocky tells you right away if you made money.
Onboarding.welcomeBot1: Hi! I'm Rocky. Every day I help you understand whether your venue is making money, no numbers expertise required.
Onboarding.welcomeBot2: It takes 45 seconds to get started. You can add fixed costs and staff later — whenever you like.
Onboarding.tourTabWeekDesc: 7-day trend: Prime Cost, best and worst day.
Onboarding.tourTabMonthDesc: Full P&L, break even, real cash net of VAT and taxes.
Onboarding.tourTabYearDesc: Net margin, seasonality and venue value over time.
Onboarding.tourTabLearnDesc: Ask about the meaning of any management term.
Onboarding.step2AskFormatWithout: What kind of venue do you have?
Onboarding.step4BotBase:
Great! Your venue is set up.

You can already use the app — or add fixed costs and staff now for more precise analysis.
Onboarding.step4BotWithName:
Great, {name}! Your venue is set up.

You can already use the app — or add fixed costs and staff now for more precise analysis.
Onboarding.step4BotWithVenue:
Great! {venue} is set up.

You can already use the app — or add fixed costs and staff now for more precise analysis.
Onboarding.step4BotWithNameAndVenue:
Great, {name}! {venue} is set up.

You can already use the app — or add fixed costs and staff now for more precise analysis.
Onboarding.step6IndustryAvg: We'll use the industry average for this role (~9-12€/h)
Onboarding.step7BotWith: Perfect, {name}! I have everything I need to give you precise analysis from the very first shift.
Onboarding.step7BotWithout: Perfect! I have everything I need to give you precise analysis from the very first shift.

App.greetingWeekNoName: Here's your week. Want to dig into anything?
App.greetingWeekName: Here's your week, {name}. Want to dig into anything?
App.greetingMonthNoName: Here's the month. Break even, P&L or comparison?
App.greetingMonthName: Here's the month, {name}. Break even, P&L or comparison?
App.greetingYearNoName: Here's the year. Seasonality, margin or best months?
App.greetingYearName: Here's the year, {name}. Seasonality, margin or best months?
App.greetingDayLine1Name: Hi {name}, how did the {service} service go?
App.greetingDayLine2: Tell me what you know — revenue, receipts, covers, staff, supplies. Even in free form.
App.greetingLearnLine1Name: Hi {name}! I'm analysing your recent performance.
App.greetingLearnLine2: Ask about any term or wait for my personalised suggestion.
App.learnChips: Prime Cost,Food cost,Break even,EBITDA,Shelf life,CBT,Upselling,Standard Operating Procedures,Supplier Management

Settings.noFixedCostsCta: No fixed costs. Add them to calculate break even.
Settings.noStaffCta: No employees. Add them to calculate staff costs.

Month.noShiftsDesc: Log the first shift in the Today tab to see monthly KPIs here.

Year.noDataDesc: Log your shifts in the Today tab to build the annual analysis.
